content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-project-v4/booking-app/.codalio/acceptance-criteria.json:
     1	{
     2	  "criteria": [
     3	    {
     4	      "id": "AC-1",
     5	      "name": "Two co-existing Rhino route groups: multi-tenant for staff (/api/:organization/) and single-tenant for customers (/api/customer/)",
     6	      "user_story": "Hybrid Tenancy Route Groups",
     7	      "status": "pending",
     8	      "subtasks": [
     9	        "Configure route groups in config/routes.rb",
    10	        "Configure ResolveOrganizationFromRoute middleware in config/initializers/rhino.rb"
    11	      ]
    12	    },
    13	    {
    14	      "id": "AC-2",
    15	      "name": "Staff can create and manage services with a status field (active / draft / inactive). Only active services are visible to customers.",
    16	      "user_story": "Service Management",
    17	      "status": "pending",
    18	      "subtasks": [
    19	        "Create services blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/services.yaml",
    20	        "Verify Service model validations and status enum in app/models/service.rb"
    21	      ]
    22	    },
    23	    {
    24	      "id": "AC-3",
    25	      "name": "Organizations manage their staff roster. Staff members are org-scoped and not visible on the customer route.",
    26	      "user_story": "Staff Members Management",
    27	      "status": "pending",
    28	      "subtasks": [
    29	        "Create staff_members blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/staff_members.yaml",
    30	        "Verify StaffMember model validations in app/models/staff_member.rb"
    31	      ]
    32	    },
    33	    {
    34	      "id": "AC-4",
    35	      "name": "Staff create available time slots linked to a service and optionally a staff member. Slots have an available boolean. Only available slots are visible to customers.",
    36	      "user_story": "Time Slot Management",
    37	      "status": "pending",
    38	      "subtasks": [
    39	        "Create time_slots blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/time_slots.yaml",
    40	        "Verify TimeSlot model validations in app/models/time_slot.rb"
    41	      ]
    42	    },
    43	    {
    44	      "id": "AC-5",
    45	      "name": "Customers browse active services and available time slots, then create bookings referencing a time slot. A booking marks the slot as unavailable.",
    46	      "user_story": "Customer Booking Creation",
    47	      "status": "pending",
    48	      "subtasks": [
    49	        "Create bookings blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/bookings.yaml",
    50	        "Add after_create callback in app/models/booking.rb to mark the associated TimeSlot as unavailable"
    51	      ]
    52	    },
    53	    {
    54	      "id": "AC-6",
    55	      "name": "Bookings progress through states (pending -> confirmed -> completed -> cancelled). Staff can update any booking status. Customers can only cancel their own pending bookings.",
    56	      "user_story": "Booking Lifecycle",
    57	      "status": "pending",
    58	      "subtasks": [
    59	        "Add status validation and state transition checks in app/models/booking.rb",
    60	        "Implement custom update policy in app/policies/booking_policy.rb to restrict customer updates to cancelling pending bookings"
    61	      ]
    62	    },
    63	    {
    64	      "id": "AC-7",
    65	      "name": "The organization route enforces organization_id scoping on all owned models. Org A staff cannot see, update, or delete Org B's resources (returns 404 not 403).",
    66	      "user_story": "Cross-Tenant Isolation",
    67	      "status": "pending",
    68	      "subtasks": [
    69	        "Verify rhino_owner :organization is set on Service, StaffMember, TimeSlot, and Booking models",
    70	        "Write cross-tenant isolation tests in test/models/cross_tenant_isolation_test.rb"
    71	      ]
    72	    },
    73	    {
    74	      "id": "AC-8",
    75	      "name": "The customer route enforces current_user scoping on bookings. Customer A cannot see, update, or delete Customer B's bookings (returns 404).",
    76	      "user_story": "Cross-User Isolation",
    77	      "status": "pending",
    78	      "subtasks": [
    79	        "Implement BookingScope in app/models/scopes/booking_scope.rb to filter by current_user.id on customer route",
    80	        "Write cross-user isolation tests in test/models/cross_user_isolation_test.rb"
    81	      ]
    82	    },
    83	    {
    84	      "id": "AC-9",
    85	      "name": "Customers never see draft or inactive services; customers never see unavailable time slots.",
    86	      "user_story": "Draft/Inactive Hiding",
    87	      "status": "pending",
    88	      "subtasks": [
    89	        "Implement ServiceScope in app/models/scopes/service_scope.rb to filter to status: active on customer route",
    90	        "Implement TimeSlotScope in app/models/scopes/time_slot_scope.rb to filter to available: true on customer route"
    91	      ]
    92	    },
    93	    {
    94	      "id": "AC-10",
    95	      "name": "Customers see only active services and available slots from their organization.",
    96	      "user_story": "Active-Only Customer Catalog",
    97	      "status": "pending",
    98	      "subtasks": [
    99	        "Verify ServiceScope and TimeSlotScope correctly filter by organization context on customer route",
   100	        "Write catalog visibility tests in test/models/catalog_visibility_test.rb"
   101	      ]
   102	    },
   103	    {
   104	      "id": "AC-11",
   105	      "name": "Customers cannot create, update, or delete services, staff members, or time slots.",
   106	      "user_story": "Staff Write Protection",
   107	      "status": "pending",
   108	      "subtasks": [
   109	        "Verify customer role permissions in services.yaml, staff_members.yaml, and time_slots.yaml blueprints",
   110	        "Write write protection tests in test/policies/write_protection_test.rb"
   111	      ]
   112	    },
   113	    {
   114	      "id": "AC-12",
   115	      "name": "Cross-org index returns 200 with empty or filtered list, never 404.",
   116	      "user_story": "Index Exclusion",
   117	      "status": "pending",
   118	      "subtasks": [
   119	        "Verify index actions return empty array or filtered list instead of raising RecordNotFound",
   120	        "Write index exclusion tests in test/controllers/index_exclusion_test.rb"
   121	      ]
   122	    },
   123	    {
   124	      "id": "AC-13",
   125	      "name": "All routes return 401 without a valid token.",
   126	      "user_story": "Unauthenticated Access",
   127	      "status": "pending",
   128	      "subtasks": [
   129	        "Verify authenticate_user! or equivalent auth guard is active on all API routes",
   130	        "Write unauthenticated access tests in test/controllers/unauthenticated_access_test.rb"
   131	      ]
   132	    },
   133	    {
   134	      "id": "AC-14",
   135	      "name": "Seed the specified users, organizations, roles, and sample data.",
   136	      "user_story": "Seed Data",
   137	      "status": "pending",
   138	      "subtasks": [
   139	        "Implement db/seeds.rb to create ClipMaster, HealWell, and the specified admin, staff, and customer users with correct roles"
   140	      ]
   141	    },
   142	    {
   143	      "id": "AC-15",
   144	      "name": "The time_slots table has organization_id and is properly scoped to ensure robust multi-tenant isolation.",
   145	      "user_story": "Gap compensation: Time Slot Organization ID (DATA_MODEL_UX_MISMATCH)",
   146	      "compensated_from_gap": "DATA_MODEL_UX_MISMATCH",
   147	      "status": "pending",
   148	      "subtasks": [
   149	        "Add organization_id to time_slots blueprint and migration",
   150	        "Verify TimeSlot belongs_to :organization and has rhino_owner :organization"
   151	      ]
   152	    }
   153	  ],
   154	  "updated_at": "2026-07-16T20:35:00Z"
